title: Written By Dr. Swift On His Own Deafness, In September, 1734
content:
Vertiginosus, inops, surdus, male gratus amicis;
    Non campana sonans, tonitru non ab Jove missum,
    Quod mage mirandum, saltem si credere fas est,
    Non clamosa meas mulier jam percutit aures.
meaning:
Jonathan Swift's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Written By Dr. Swift On His Own Deafness, In September, 1734"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
